data.raceName: BOOST YOUR ODDS WITH BETDELUXE HEAT 2
data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. TUSKEN TIGER produced a moderate run last time when sixth at this track over 407m behind How's Warren (24.48) in a Grade 4/5. Strong form has emerged from her last run. Should bounce back. 1. DIAMANTINA OPAL has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing fourth (24.44) in a Grade 5 at this track. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Expected to give a good account. 4. DROPPING GEARS comes off an average effort last start when sixth at this track over 407m behind Canya Aurora (24.42) in a Grade 4/5. Placed at his previous run. Form from his last run is proving strong. Must be included in calculations. 7. FEDERAL TOMMY was out of the frame here most recently but can atone.","runners":[2,1,4,7],"exclusive":false}
